character_A.description: Primary channel mascot — minimalist black stick figure, circular head, dot eyes, simple line limbs, cream/beige background, hand-drawn doodle style

character_pose_walk.description: Same stick figure character walking, smiling, with simple props — same line-art style as character_A

character_pose_sleep.description: Same stick figure sleeping in bed — identical head/face style, minimalist line art

style_infographic.description: Clean flat infographic style for diagrams — teal/navy palette, simple labels, educational layout on beige background
